goals.description: Initiate a direct, non-negotiable text negotiation with roommate_R to immediately clear the laundry backlog, explicitly linking their delay to my 2-hour sleep debt and the specific cognitive constraints required for the Wednesday reading response.
goals.rationale: My value system weights academic outcomes above social harmony. This confrontation is not an emotional outburst but a strategic acquisition of resources (clean space/time). Given my assertive conflict style and high sleep discipline, I will treat this as a non-negotiable prerequisite for hitting the Wednesday reading response deadline. Softening now would signal weakness and compromise my long-term planning horizon.
